preset.title: Preset
preset.description: Icon output preset. 'normal' means plain SVG mode. 'flutter' writes SVGs + a Dart barrel (lib/icons.dart by default). Others are framework presets or an emptysvg placeholder.

svg_view_cmd.title: SVG View Command
svg_view_cmd.description: Command used to open an SVG. Supports `%filename%` placeholder, for example: `zed %filename%`.

flutter_barrel_file.title: Flutter Barrel File
flutter_barrel_file.description: Project-root-relative path to the generated Dart barrel when preset='flutter'. Default: `lib/icons.dart`.

flutter_barrel_class.title: Flutter Barrel Class
flutter_barrel_class.description: Dart class name emitted into the barrel when preset='flutter'. Default: `AppIcons`.
